free_text: Interaction of 12C ions with nuclei of enriched tin
isotopes at an energy of 2.2 GeV per nucleon
English translation
Metallic targets Sn-112,Sn-118, Sn-120 and Sn-124 used.
Enrichment and thickness was
In order to detect short-lived radioactive
elements, 118,120,124Sn target nuclei were irradiated
for 0.7 hr.
In order to detect long-lived radioactive elements,
a different set of 112,118,120,124Sn targets were
irradiated for 10.8333 hr.
No information about source of uncertainty
Table 2 from Phys.Atom.Nucl.,75(2012)125
